section_subtitle: From raw dough to golden crust. Here's how the magic happens.

steps.description: We knead through your goals, audience, and competitors. Every great website starts with understanding what makes your business unique.
steps.chef_note: A rushed dough never rises. Take time with this step — it shapes everything.

steps.description: You pick the flavors, I arrange them beautifully. Wireframes, mockups, and prototypes — tasted and approved before we fire up the oven.
steps.chef_note: Less can be more. The best pizzas don't need 47 toppings.

steps.description: Code is written. Pixels are placed. The kitchen gets hot. This is where the recipe transforms from ingredients into something real.
steps.chef_note: I keep the oven door closed — no peeking! But I'll send you progress updates.

steps.description: No burnt edges. No raw centers. Every page is tested across devices and browsers. Your feedback is the final seasoning before we serve.
steps.chef_note: I test on real devices, not just the ones I like. Your users won't all have the latest iPhone.

steps.description: Fresh out of the oven, straight to your domain. Deployed, optimized, and ready for your audience to devour.
steps.chef_note: Launching is the beginning, not the end. I stick around for seconds.
